title: Blackout

strategosText: Our uplink cipher is gone — lifted clean. The trail ends at a Phantom listening post beyond the worm belt. No carryall lanes; the belt's storm column grounds everything. We cross the deep sand or we do not cross.
Thumper teams will buy passage. Spend them precisely. Take the post's archive intact: I want to know who has been selling our timings since landfall.
One more thing. If the archive says what I believe it says, the Charter was never a race. Steel yourself for the audit we were never meant to pass.

objectives.text: Capture the Phantom listening post with an Engineer (do NOT destroy it)

actions.text: Strategos: The archive burned with it. We have learned nothing, at full price.

Strategos: Decrypting... sender confirmed. The Concordat feeds the losing claimant our movements — every claimant, every cycle. Nobody wins; the world stays theirs. The Charter is a culling. Campaign continues in the next operation.

notes: Introduces worms+thumpers+blooms under pressure; mission requires Phase 7 systems — schedule after P7 if building campaign early.
